definition: A financial relationship with the subject matter of insurance that gives the insured a right to insure.
jp: 保険の目的物との経済的利害関係

definition: Both parties must disclose all material facts. Also known as uberrimae fidei.
jp: 告知義務。英米法概念。日本では質問応答義務に変更（2008年）

definition: Restoring the insured to the same financial position as before the loss — no better, no worse.
jp: 実損払い。利得禁止原則の基本

definition: The right of the insurer to recover from a third party responsible for the loss, after paying the claim.
jp: 請求権代位。保険法25条

definition: When two or more policies cover the same risk, each insurer pays its proportionate share.
jp: 重複保険時の各保険者の按分負担

definition: The dominant, operative, and effective cause of a loss.
jp: 因果関係の判断基準。相当因果関係説との関連

definition: A fundamental term in the insurance contract that must be strictly complied with.
jp: 英米法特有。日本の保険法に直接の対応概念なし

definition: Any fact that would influence the judgment of a prudent insurer in assessing a risk.
jp: 告知すべき重要な事実

definition: The amount paid by the insured to the insurer in exchange for insurance coverage.
jp: 契約者が支払う対価

definition: The maximum amount payable by the insurer under the policy.
jp: 保険者が支払う上限額

definition: The amount the insured must bear before the insurer pays. Also called excess.
jpTerm: 免責金額（ディダクティブル）
jp: 自己負担額。SGでは'excess'とも呼ぶ

definition: The first portion of a loss borne by the insured. Same as deductible in Singapore context.
jp: 免責金額の英国式表現。SGではdeductibleと同義

definition: A temporary document confirming insurance coverage before the policy is issued.
jp: 保険証券発行前の暫定的な付保証明

definition: A document that amends the terms of an existing insurance policy.
jp: 保険契約内容の変更・追加書類

definition: Insurance purchased by an insurer to transfer part of its risk to another insurer (reinsurer).
jp: 保険者が自己のリスクの一部を他の保険者に移転

definition: Sharing of a risk among two or more insurers, each accepting a defined proportion.
jp: 複数の保険者がリスクを分担

definition: Reinsurance arranged on a case-by-case basis for individual risks.
jp: 個別リスクごとに手配する再保険

definition: A standing agreement where the reinsurer automatically accepts a defined share of all qualifying risks.
jp: 包括的な再保険契約。自動的に出再

definition: The process of evaluating and accepting risks, and determining appropriate premiums.
jp: リスク評価・引受判断・料率算定のプロセス

definition: A formal request by the insured to the insurer for payment under the policy.
jp: 保険事故発生時の給付請求

definition: An independent professional who investigates and assesses claims on behalf of the insurer.
jp: 保険者の委託を受けて損害調査を行う専門家

definition: An intermediary who acts on behalf of the insured to arrange insurance.
jpTerm: 保険仲立人（ブローカー）
jp: 顧客側に立って保険契約を媒介する者

definition: An intermediary who represents and acts on behalf of the insurer.
jp: 保険会社の委託を受けて募集を行う者

definition: Monetary Authority of Singapore — the integrated financial regulator and central bank.
jpTerm: シンガポール金融管理局
jp: 金融庁＋日本銀行の機能を兼ねる統合型規制当局

definition: The principal legislation governing all insurance business in Singapore.
jp: SGの保険業全般を規律する基本法。日本の保険業法に相当

definition: Financial Industry Disputes Resolution Centre — provides dispute resolution for consumers against financial institutions.
jpTerm: 金融紛争解決センター
jp: 日本のそんぽADRセンター・生保相談所に相当

definition: Personal Data Protection Act — Singapore's data protection law governing collection, use, and disclosure of personal data.
jp: 日本の個人情報保護法に相当。Do Not Call規定あり

definition: Work Injury Compensation Act — provides no-fault compensation for work-related injuries in Singapore.
jp: 日本の労災保険法に相当。無過失責任制度

definition: A voluntary sacrifice to save a vessel and cargo, shared proportionally among all parties.
jp: 商法788条以下。ヨーク・アントワープ規則に基づく

definition: A partial loss borne solely by the owner of the damaged property, not shared.
jp: 共同海損と対比される概念。損害を受けた者のみが負担

definition: Contractors' All Risks — comprehensive insurance for construction projects.
jp: 工事物件・第三者賠償を包括的に補償

definition: Business Interruption — insurance covering loss of profit due to an insured peril.
jp: 営業中断による逸失利益を填補

definition: Requirement that a valid property policy must be in force as a condition for a BI claim.
jp: 利益保険の支払いに物的損害保険の付保が必須

definition: Directors and Officers liability insurance protecting company leaders against personal liability.
jpTerm: 会社役員賠償責任保険
jp: Side A/B/C構造。2021年会社法改正で開示規制強化

definition: Product Liability insurance covering claims from defective products.
jp: PL法（製造物責任法）に基づく賠償を填補

definition: Group Personal Accident insurance — 24-hour accident coverage for employees.
jp: 業務内外の事故を24時間補償

definition: Third Party Only — minimum compulsory motor insurance in Singapore.
jp: SGの最低限の自動車強制保険。日本の自賠責は対人のみ

definition: Third Party, Fire and Theft — motor insurance covering TPO plus fire and theft of own vehicle.
jp: TPOに自車の火災・盗難を追加したカバー

definition: Insurance against financial loss caused by dishonest acts of employees.
jp: 従業員の不正行為による損失を填補

definition: The risk that an insured may behave differently (more recklessly) because they have insurance.
jp: 保険の存在が被保険者の行動を変えるリスク

definition: The tendency for higher-risk individuals to seek insurance more than lower-risk individuals.
jp: リスクの高い者ほど保険に加入しやすい傾向

definition: A specific peril, condition, or circumstance not covered by the policy.
jp: 保険金支払いの対象外となる事由

definition: A condition that must be fulfilled before the insurer's liability attaches.
jp: 保険者の責任発生の前提条件

definition: Damaged property recovered after a claim has been paid. The insurer may sell it to reduce the net loss.
jp: 保険金支払い後に回収された損害物

definition: The amount of risk an insurer keeps for its own account, not reinsured.
jp: 再保険に出さず自社で保有するリスク額

definition: An insurer that transfers risk to a reinsurer.
jp: 再保険に出す側の保険者

definition: MAS Notice on Minimum Standards and CPD for Insurance Brokers and Broking Staff.
jp: 保険ブローカーの最低基準・継続教育要件を規定

definition: Certificate in General Insurance — the qualification comprising BCP + PGI or BCP + ComGI.
jp: SG損保ブローカーの必須資格。BCPが基礎、ComGIが法人損保

definition: Fairness, Ethics, Accountability, Transparency — MAS guidelines for AI and data analytics in finance.
jp: 金融分野のAI利用に関するMASガイドライン。日本にも類似の指針あり

definition: The maximum total amount an insurer will pay for all claims during a policy period.
jp: 保険期間中の累計支払上限

definition: Policy responds to losses that occur during the policy period, regardless of when the claim is made.
jp: 保険期間中に発生した事故が対象。claims-madeベースとの対比
